question:
①In the video, first locate a large silver SUV making a slow right turn in the center of the frame toward a distant building entrance.
②As the vehicle turns, a man in a beige T-shirt walks from the front of the SUV toward the camera, against the flow of traffic.
③Follow the man in the beige shirt as he passes a woman.
④Observe this woman; what color is the object she is holding in her right hand?

①Locate the automatic glass door entrance leading indoors (Dining Pavilion) directly in front.
②Wait until two young men walk out of this door side by side.
③Between them, one man is carrying a white plastic shopping bag and wearing long pants.
④What color are the slides (slippers) he is wearing?

①Inside the mall, locate a shop on the right with a green glowing sign named 'MAGIC PEARLS'.
②Near this shop, a muscular man in a dark grey short-sleeved T-shirt is walking toward the camera.
③Behind and to the left of the man in grey, there is another man wearing black-framed glasses and a pink top.
④What color are the pants of the man in the pink top?

①Find a booth displaying a green car (near the Divine Diamonds Kiosk).
②Identify a man sitting on the trunk of this green car.
③Centering on this man, look for an open-style stall (Stall A) directly behind him.
④As a couple passes the entrance of Stall A walking away from the camera, what color is the woman's top?

①Locate a police officer with a K9 dog in the video.
②Directly behind the officer, there is a stall where a man in a red shirt is waiting for food.
③In which direction is the 'Tous' shop located relative to the man in the red shirt?

①Find the 'Capital One Café' on the left side of the video.
②Locate a woman in a white top with a shoulder bag walking past the café entrance.
③She passes a man in a black T-shirt walking toward the camera who is looking at his phone.
④What color are this man's shoes?

①In the video, first find an electronics/gaming store with a black storefront and a sign with glowing green letters.
②Look directly across the hallway from this store to find a square standalone kiosk with a 'GlassesUSA' sign in black letters on a white background.
③Go behind this kiosk to find a fruit and drink stall named 'Mang Mia' immediately adjacent to it.
④A man with a pink backpack is waiting in front of this fruit stall.
⑤Observe the large square pillar behind him (between him and the UNIQLO store) which has a vertical digital sign saying 'Find it @ The Mall'.
⑥At this moment, a woman in a light blue dress passes the pillar with a little girl. What color is the little girl's top?

①Locate a woman wearing pink clothes pushing a stroller; watch her as she enters a store.
②Identify a man sitting and resting directly to the left of this woman at the moment she enters.
③What color are the words on the sign of the shop located to the front-right of this man?

①Find a highly recognizable store with a storefront consisting of large areas of black and bright neon yellow/green (JD Sports).
②Across the hallway from this store is a sports shop named 'Champs Sports'.
③Between these two stores, there is a glass display kiosk (Vape CBD) showing many anime figurines (like Dragon Ball).
④Locate a muscular man in a blue jersey (with 'UNIBET' in white on the chest) walking toward the camera, having just passed the kiosk.
⑤Behind him (about 3-5 meters) follows a man in a yellow T-shirt.
⑥From the perspective of the man in the yellow T-shirt, there is a woman in a white top to his left (the right side of the screen). What color is the bag she is carrying?

①Locate a shop on the right side with a black and white striped awning.
②Find a man in a grey jacket and dark pants walking past the store while looking at his phone.
③At this moment, Man A, wearing a blue hat and blue T-shirt, overtakes him from behind.
④When Man A appears, what color is the top of the man to A's left?

①Find the 'Crêpe Delicious' food kiosk in the middle of the hallway.
②Identify a man in a grey T-shirt and dark shorts sitting at a round table, looking at an electronic device (or phone).
③From the camera's perspective, directly behind him is a store with a unique style, featuring a bright green door frame and facade.
④There is a white advertisement easel standing at the entrance of this green store.
⑤What color is the bottom (underwear/shorts) of the person depicted on the easel's poster?

①Find a male salesman dressed in all black, holding trial samples in the middle of the hallway.
②Observe the passerby he tries to intercept; she is a woman in a grey T-shirt with a large white 'Adidas' logo on the chest.
③Trace her path back: before meeting the salesman, she passed a woman in blue who was carrying a red shopping bag with white text.
④At the moment they pass each other, there is a white display cart parked next to the woman in blue (on the left of the frame).
⑤What color is the word printed on the base of this white display cart?

①Move along the hallway until you see a shop named 'Claire's' on the right.
②As you pass this shop, a man in a shirt with a large American flag pattern walks toward the camera.
③Ignore him and continue forward until a boba tea shop named 'MAGIC PEARLS' appears on the right.
④At this moment, look at the bench area on the left side (opposite the tea shop) where a woman in a red top is sitting.
⑤A man in a white Polo shirt, with his back to the camera, walks past the woman in red toward the distance.
⑥What color are the shorts worn by this man in the white Polo shirt?

①Find a vertical digital billboard in the middle of the path showing a 'MANGO' brand advertisement.
②Standing next to this billboard is a man in a black jersey looking down at his phone.
③Observe the number on the back of his jersey (it is 10).
④Look past this man and continue down the hall until you see a large red 'H&M' sign on the right.
⑤In front of the H&M window, an adult male is crouching on the ground.
⑥He is taking care of a standing child. What is the main color of the child's outfit (dress/set)?

①Locate a shop named 'SWAIDAN' on the right side of the hallway.
②As the camera moves forward, the red 'JCPenney' sign is visible in the distance.
③Before reaching JCPenney, notice a brightly colored store named 'Fun Factory' on the left.
④Near this shop, a family walks toward the camera, with a man in a green T-shirt pushing a stroller.
⑤As the family passes, look to the far right to find a man in a white long-sleeved T-shirt and a white hat walking away from the camera.
⑥There is a colored logo on the back of his white shirt. Which animal is depicted in this logo?

①Locate the large 'JCPenney' store in the video.
②Directly beneath the store's sign, there is a row of seating for resting.
③Looking to the right from the camera's perspective, find a large blue wall featuring a mural of a roller coaster.
④On the mural, several children have their hands raised. Identify the child on the far right and note her top color (Color A).
⑤At this moment, a pedestrian walking by is wearing a top of the same Color A.
⑥As this pedestrian passes a man sitting on a bench, assume you are that seated man facing the mural. What is the name of the shop on the closest vertical billboard to your left?

①Locate a Black man walking toward the camera wearing a full red tracksuit (red T-shirt and pants with a black Jordan logo).
②As he walks, he passes a group of young girls walking in the opposite direction.
③Observe the girls' uniform T-shirts and note the pattern on the back (tie-dye/pink and black mix).
④Follow the girls in tie-dye shirts as they walk toward a brightly decorated candy store with green and pink accents.
⑤Once you find the candy store, look to its immediate right from the camera's perspective.
⑥What is the brand name on the sign of the predominantly white-decorated shop located there?

①As the camera advances, find a shop named 'Fine Ink' with a red and black sign.
②To the left of this shop, there is a Barber Shop with a signature spinning pole.
③Further left is a massage shop (Relax Spa) where a woman in black is pointing at a price board.
④Move left again to find a blue archway leading to a back area next to the spa.
⑤To the left of the archway is a food shop.
⑥Inside the pillar on the far right of this food shop, there is a vending machine. What is the yellow 3D capital word printed directly above this vending machine?

①At the start of this segment, locate a couple resting on a mall bench; the woman is wearing a pink top and camouflage pants.
②Find the shop to the right of the direction she is facing, which has a red background sign (FINE INK).
③Look to the left of that sign to find a large blue curved wall with white cursive text (Orlando).
④Enter the department store (SEARS) through the entrance next to the blue wall. Near the entrance, you will see three vertically displayed kayaks.
⑤Identify the orange kayak among the three.
⑥Next to the orange kayak is a purple promotional billboard. What color is the bikini worn by the person on this purple poster?

①Find a man looking at bicycles wearing a blue and white striped Polo shirt and beige shorts.
②Follow the aisle he is in as the camera moves forward, passing a shelf on the left displaying bamboo torches (labeled TIKI).
③Continue forward to find a large yellow water sports board (paddleboard/surfboard) leaning vertically on the right side of the aisle.
④As the camera passes the yellow board, look left at the mattress sales area and locate a square pillar hanging with beige rug/towel samples.
⑤A blue machine (Price Check) is mounted on the front of this pillar. What white punctuation mark is printed at the very top of the blue machine's sign?

①In the first minute of the video, find the static screen that lists the 'Property Specs'.
②In this list, find the number representing the 'Car Garage' capacity and denote it as 'n'.
③Return to the beginning of the video and find an aerial shot that clearly shows these 'n' brown garage doors.
④In the foreground of this shot (directly in front of the garage doors), there is a row of small conical green trees planted on a light-colored concrete edge. Focus on the leftmost tree in this row.
⑤Imagine you are standing next to this leftmost tree, facing the 'n' garage doors. What is the color of the roof of the large non-residential standalone building located in the far back-left of your field of vision?

①Locate an aerial shot where the camera retreats through two fully open black gates flanked by stone pillars.
②As you pass through the gates, observe an SUV parked on the far left of the driveway and denote its color as 'a'.
③The camera then switches to a first-person perspective, walking along the curved concrete driveway toward the main entrance.
④During the walk, a dirt/gravel path branches off the grass to the right. A prominent landscape rock is placed at the junction of the dirt path and the concrete driveway.
⑤Imagine you are standing on this landscape rock, facing the SUV of color 'a'. In this position, where is the house's main entrance with the large wooden A-frame roof located relative to you?

①Find the moment when the camera is outside the wooden double doors, about to enter the house.
②Observe the reflection in the glass to the right of the door and identify the primary light color of the person's upper clothing.
③After entering the house, look to the left to find a small glass-enclosed space (wine cellar) hidden under the wooden stairs.
④Look inside this glass space and identify the texture/material of the innermost back wall (grey stone texture).
⑤Imagine you are the person seen in the reflection, and you walk into this glass space under the stairs, standing with your back against that innermost stone wall, facing outward. Where is the large white marble fireplace (with black trim and wooden shelves) located relative to you?

①Locate the staircase area with horizontal black metal railings and wooden steps.
②Follow the stairs down to the ground level, then look across the hall at the large white marble structure with grey veins (the fireplace).
③To the right of this marble structure (from the camera's perspective), there is a column of wooden shelves built into the wall.
④Move your gaze to the right of these shelves until you see a large floor-to-ceiling glass door leading to the backyard lawn.
⑤Observe the wall area directly above this glass door, which is decorated with vertical slats. What color is this wall area?

①Find the wine rack display area enclosed by glass walls under the stairs.
②Locate a small doorway to the left of this glass area and follow the camera into this narrow storage space.
③Inside this small room, find a wall with the same light-colored stone veneer as the background wall of the wine rack area outside.
④On the lower half of this stone wall, there is a small white double door.
⑤Observe what is hidden behind the doors when the person opens the left panel.

①The camera moves to a large kitchen island with a dark base and a white countertop.
②Look past the island to the cooking area on the back wall and find the large white stove with multiple knobs.
③Above the stove, there is a trapezoidal range hood cover made of a brown natural material.
④Focus on the white tile backsplash area between the brown hood and the stove below.
⑤A black metal fixture with folding joints is installed on the wall in this area. What is the specific function of this device in the kitchen?

①Locate the large refrigerator in the kitchen disguised as white double-door cabinets.
②Observe the single beverage can inside when the fridge is opened; note which side of the vertical centerline it is on (Direction D1).
③Enter the hidden pantry to the right of the oven, which features white open shelving.
④Find the black faucet and the metal dishwasher installed under the counter in the pantry.
⑤Note which side of the black faucet the dishwasher is located on (Direction D2).
⑥Find a square empty space under the counter on the wall corresponding to Direction D1 in the pantry.
⑦Stand directly in front of and facing this empty space. Where is the metal dishwasher (Direction D2) located relative to your current position?

①In the open living area, find the white marble fireplace with grey veining in the center.
②Observe the large black kitchen island in front of the fireplace; how many transparent glass pendant lights are hanging directly above it? (Number X).
③Walk through the hallway to the mudroom area featuring a built-in bench. Note which side of the hallway the bench is on as you enter (Direction D1).
④Count the black hooks installed on the white vertical slat backboard of this bench (Number Y).
⑤If X equals Y, imagine sitting in the exact center of the bench with your back against the middle hook, facing the opposite wall.
⑥On the wall you are facing, there is a black circular vent. In this sitting position, where is the entrance hallway leading back to the living room located?

①Near the end of the hallway, locate a single white door with a large pane of opaque frosted glass.
②Open the door to enter a very spacious indoor garage.
③Notice the standalone utility sink in the corner against the right-hand wall; what color is it? (Color C).
④Count the dark structural pillars standing in a row in the center of the garage (Number N).
⑤Imagine standing next to the first pillar closest to the entrance with your back against it.
⑥Turn right until your body is directly facing the utility sink of Color C.
⑦While facing the sink, where are the white garage doors with glass windows located relative to you?

①In the spacious garage featuring three large white doors, locate the single door with frosted glass.
②Enter this door to reach a room with a sink and a mudroom area. Find the bench with storage compartments and note the color of the wood seat (Color A).
③Leave the room and walk through the wainscoted hallway into the room at the far end with a ceiling fan.
④In this room, find a built-in structure (Structure B) featuring horizontal planks made of the same material and color as Color A.
⑤Imagine standing in the center of this room, facing Structure B. Where is the large sliding glass door leading outside located relative to you?

①Locate the room with a black ceiling fan, open the white double doors of the closet, and note the color of the hanging rod inside (Color X).
②Leave the room and walk down the hallway until you reach a corridor with a series of independent windows; confirm the frames are also Color X.
③Look through these windows at the mechanical equipment (AC unit) on the ground outside and note the 2D geometric shape of its top vent mesh (Shape Y).
④Imagine standing in this hallway facing the window with the AC unit, looking down at Shape Y.
⑤What specific decoration or material is used on the lower half of the wall directly behind you (the opposite wall of the hallway)?

①In the large hall with vaulted ceilings and exposed wooden beams, find the wall with white wainscoting on the bottom and four independent windows on top (Wall N).
②Imagine standing in the center of the hall facing Wall N. The wall to your left (Wall W) contains a set of large black-framed sliding doors.
③Through Wall W's doors, you can see an outdoor covered patio with a long stone/brick bar (Object S).
④The wall to your right (Wall E) features a kitchen area with white countertops, a farmhouse sink, and a large window above the sink.
⑤Turn 90 degrees to the right and walk toward Wall E until you are standing at the sink, facing the window.
⑥In this position, where is Object S (the outdoor patio bar) located relative to you?
